name: Cranberry-Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the flours, sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, allspice, and salt. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add the butter, pumpkin puree, and eggs to the dry ingredients. Stir until just moistened.
4. Stir in the cranberries.
5. Spoon the batter into 24 greased muffin cups.
6. Place the muffin tins in the hot oven.
7. Bake for 40 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
